title: St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala
tagline: St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala, Kerala

overview.short: St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Stanislaus Forane Church is an active Syro-Malabar church located in Mala, Thrissur district, in Kerala, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mala, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Mala is a small town in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. There is a Jewish synagogue in Mala town.

topPlaces.name: Kuruvilassery
topPlaces.description: Kuruvilassery is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Ashtamichira
topPlaces.description: Ashtamichira is a village in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The vast paddy fields and coconut groves that surround Ashtamichira represent the core strength of the area, which is agriculture.

topPlaces.name: Kakkulissery
topPlaces.description: Kakkulissery is a small village in the southern end of Thrissur district in Chalakkudy taluka of Kerala, India. The language spoken by the majority of people in this area is Malayalam.

topPlaces.name: Vynthala Lake
topPlaces.description: Vynthala Lake (Malayalam: വൈന്തല തടാകം) is a natural oxbow lake found in Vynthala, near Mala, Thrissur District of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Iranikulam Sree Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Iranikulam Sree Mahadeva Temple is in Iranikulam, Mala in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple has two main deities, Thekkadathappan and Vadakkedathappan, both versions of Shiva.

topPlaces.name: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor
topPlaces.description: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor, popularly known as Sampaloor Palli, is a pilgrim centre coming under the Diocese of Kottapuram of the Archdiocese of Verapoly.

topPlaces.name: Kadukutty
topPlaces.description: Kadukutty is a village and Gram panchayat in the Chalakudy block in the Thrissur district, state of Kerala, India. It is surrounded by the Chalakudy river on three sides.

items.note: Mala is a small town in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. There is a Jewish synagogue in Mala town.
Kuruvilassery is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

Ashtamichira is a village in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The vast paddy fields and coconut groves that surround Ashtamichira represent the core strength of the area, which is agriculture.
Kakkulissery is a small village in the southern end of Thrissur district in Chalakkudy taluka of Kerala, India. The language spoken by the majority of people in this area is Malayalam.
Vynthala Lake (Malayalam: വൈന്തല തടാകം) is a natural oxbow lake found in Vynthala, near Mala, Thrissur District of Kerala.

Iranikulam Sree Mahadeva Temple is in Iranikulam, Mala in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple has two main deities, Thekkadathappan and Vadakkedathappan, both versions of Shiva.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor & around

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala?
faq.a: Stays in St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Stanislaus Forane Church, Mala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mala, Kerala, Kuruvilassery, Ashtamichira, Kakkulissery, Vynthala Lake.
